0.text: Fibrotic densities more prominent in the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Increased interlobar and interlobular septal thickening in the peripheral parts and upper lobes of both lungs

2.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs

3.text: Air cyst in the superior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

4.text: Nonspecific scarring pulmonary nodules in both lungs

5.text: Subpleural and calcific pulmonary nodules in both lungs

6.text: Largest nodule in the lateral part of the right middle lobe measuring approximately 5 mm in diameter
